title: Tutorial: First Session
prompt: This is a guided walkthrough of the interview simulator. Use it to learn the flow before enabling real problem packs in Settings. After you press Ready, read this prompt, open the editor, write a few short notes about what each part of the app does, ask the proctor one question, then submit when you are done.
constraints: The prompt stays hidden until you press Ready. Start Timer.
The editor unlocks only after the timer starts.
The proctor chat unlocks only after the timer starts.
When you are ready for real practice, open Settings and enable at least one problem pack.
scaffold:
# Tutorial notes
# 1. What did the Ready button do?
# 2. What can you use the editor for?
# 3. What can you ask the proctor?
# 4. Which problem pack do you want to enable next?

ready_button: 
editor: 
proctor_chat: 
next_problem_pack:

examples.input: Ask: "Can I ask for clarification during a session?"
examples.output: The proctor can answer clarifying questions and give nudges after the timer starts.
examples.explanation: The tutorial is successful when the user understands the app flow.

expectedApproach: Start the timer, read the prompt, use the editor for notes, send one proctor message, submit, and enable a real problem pack from Settings.
commonPitfalls: Trying to use chat before starting the timer
Expecting the editor to unlock before the prompt is revealed
Leaving all problem packs disabled after the tutorial
idealSolutionOutline: A short set of notes showing the user understands Ready, editor, proctor chat, submit, and Settings.
evaluationNotes: Pass if the user demonstrates basic navigation through the app and knows how to enable real problem packs.
